title: calylophus hartwegii
intro: Calylophus hartwegii, also known as Hartweg's sundrop or Hartweg's primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calceolariaceae. It is a perennial herb with yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Calylophus hartwegii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is said to have health benefits such as reducing stress and improving digestion.
